findings.issue: Code index builder fails to extract structural elements due to incomplete AST parsing and skipped files; archive/ directory inclusion in SKIP_DIRS prevents indexing of valid paths.
findings.recommended_fix: Move code_index.py out of archive/, add config file for module/endpoint rules, fix AST parsing to handle incomplete syntax, and adjust SKIP_DIRS to not exclude valid code paths.

whistleblower_flag: Index is empty despite recent timestamp, leading to false confidence in agent tooling. Compromises all file lookups.
